title: Party Gift Bags in 4 Pastel Colours With Handle - Small Craft Paper Loot Favour Filler - Pack of 4
features: BEAUTIFUL PASTEL COLORS - Pastel Pink, Blue, Yellow and Green will make you fall in love immediately.

MULTIPLE USE PRODUCT - These bags are great for birthday party favors, sweet bags, graduation parties, Easter, summer parties, wedding ceremonies, bridal shower, gift bags, Christmas gift bags, DIY craft bags, Thanksgiving Day, Halloween, carnival, great for craft projects.
STRONG HANDLES - The bags have made reinforced handles that are very sturdy and durable. The bag stays upright when open.
Size: Each bag measures 9 x 15 x 20.5 cm. It can easily hold snacks, small toys, small cakes, cupcakes, small jewelry, so on."
BIOGRADABLE: The gift bags are of good quality and can be reused. The materials are all biodegradable.

specifications_table.Occasion: Birthday, Christmas, Easter, Graduation, Halloween, Thanksgiving, Wedding
